name: King Phisher
description: Phishing campaign toolkit Tool: https://github.com/rsmusllp/king-phisher. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #820 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map King Phisher output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
